title: Upd8r
description: More Powerful Modpack Update Check Mod.
body:
More Powerful Modpack Update Check Mod.

Multiple update check links supported, update links based on language selection.

This mod is similar to "Versioner Minecraft Mods - CurseForge", but it does not support the features I mentioned above.

More importantly, Upd8r is a new version of the mod.

 

It has the following features:

  • Get the latest version from URL and compare it with the config.
  • If players are using an older version, they will be alerted to the update when they join the world.
  • Some info for local and network can be defined repeatedly, but priority is given to network info.
  • Define changelogs for each version.

...

Requires Mod:

  • Kotlin for Forge Minecraft Mods - CurseForge
  • Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge) Minecraft Mods - CurseForge

 

If you have suggestions you can comment or Issues.
